capability: forward-object novelty reserve is a calibrated, contextual, Born-rule probability of novelty
claim: pNext.reserve = P(next arrival is novel) is calibrated and contextual
stimulus_shape: steady-novelty vs cast-then-recurrence vs regime-shift (control); + omnimodal melodies
verdict: CONFIRMED (gap under live engine; fixed); omnimodal-confirmed (text+music)
mechanism: live reserve = novelty/(sum+novelty) with a fixed constant -> decays with step-count, blind to novelty rate. Fix: bornNoveltyReserve = gamma-weighted recent rate of becoming-something against the recurrence void (EXACT void: basis-novelty is set-membership, not a noisy score, so the Born quantile is replaced by an exact 0-void; alpha is the only policy, floor/cap [alpha,1-alpha])
fix_layer: interior (src/core/surprise.js bornNoveltyReserve + reserveMassFor; wired in src/perceiver/reading.js behind opts.calibrateReserve, default byte-identical)
scope: holds: text + music, separation Δ>0.5 text / >0.88 music, control falls, forward novelty log-loss 0.792->0.638. does-not-cover: deriveNull quantile path for NOISY novelty magnitudes (left for a continuous-surprise basis); the wiring is opt-in (RULES_REV promotion deferred)

capability: a CON/SIG bond binds two referents, not a directional/temporal adjunct in the object slot
claim: an adjunct in the verb object slot must not bond nor seed the proposition field
stimulus_shape: identical-surface 'Subject Verb X.' patients vs adjuncts (loud object-slot control)
mechanism: npObject lifted the post-verb NP head as a referent unless in a hard-coded particle list that omitted cardinal directions, 'home', and bare temporal nouns -> forged CON duane->sailed->north and injected f:north into the field. Fix: a seeded+learnable 'adjunct' convention class (isAdjunct), consulted by npObject via the same guard threading as isCopula/isModifier/isSpeech
fix_layer: organ/conventions (src/core/conventions/ledger.js SEED_ADJUNCT + isAdjunct; src/perceiver/parse/relations.js npObject; src/perceiver/parse/pipeline.js relOpts). On by default as a seed; parity 650->653 green
scope: holds: cardinal/locative directions + temporal points, defeasible+learnable. does-not-cover: ambiguous words sometimes-patients (morning/night/harbour) left to the learning loop; a fully signal-taught adjunct inducer deferred. ORTHOGONAL to cycle 001 (verbatim-recurrence streams carry no adjuncts; cycle-001 numbers byte-identical after this fix)
